title: PyroFishing texturepack
description: Pyrofishing pack for better fishing experience
body: **Check out my other resource packs!** ## 🐠Lore ## 🦈Installation - Download the **Pyrofishing pack** and the **Variants-CIT** dependency (for 1.21.2+). - Enable the **PyroFishing** resourcepack. - If used on a server, this resource pack must be placed above the server resource pack to avoid conflicts. - Join the server — all textures should display correctly. ## 🦑Dependencies 🔝1.21.2 and above - [Variants-CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit) ⬇️1.21.1 and bellow - Forge Optifine | [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) - Forge Embeddium, etc | [CIT Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forge-cit) - Fabric | [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) ## My discord: rainbowboii ## **Important Usage Notice** This FREE resource pack is intended only for personal, individual use by regular players. Server administrators / owners are not allowed to: - force this pack on their server - set it as a server resource pack - redistribute it to players via server - include it in any server configuration Please respect this restriction — the pack was made for you to enjoy on servers where you personally choose to use it. If you want to buy a pack for the server as an admin or owner, all the links are in my Discord. Thank you for understanding!
